properties.title: Reno/Sparks railroad tracks & property
properties.description: Union Pacific rail corridor through Reno-Sparks, NV: a buffered track corridor (FRA NARN + OSM centerlines) plus UP-owned assessor parcels (legal property boundaries).
sources: FRA NTAD North American Rail Network Lines (public domain)

properties.name: Rail corridor (UP mainline + yards/spurs)
properties.source: FRA NARN + OpenStreetMap centerlines, 50 ft/side buffer
properties.note: Approximate track corridor; not a survey boundary.
